name: Steven
short_description: Steven is a vampire-survivor-style game where you play as Steven, the swan. Use his attacks to devour enemies, earning points to upgrade Steven and make him stronger for the upcoming waves.
detailed_description:
Steven is a retro-style survival frenzy starring a furious swan on the run.

After breaking free from the iron grip of a tyrant king, Steven—a lone, long-necked rebel—must fight his way through endless waves of knights hellbent on ending his flight. In this vampire-survivor-inspired arena game, you’ll glide, peck, and devour your enemies, growing stronger with every second you survive.

Wield bizarre upgrades like Faster Speed, Neck Extension, Egg Hunts, and more, turning Steven from a graceful bird into a ridiculous powerhouse. Hatch loyal swanlings to join the fray, extend your deadly neck to slap down foes, and keep the chaos going as the screen floods with enemies.

🎮 Features:

  • Endless action with rogue-lite progression

  • A growing arsenal of weird and wonderful swan powers

  • Helpers hatched from eggs (because why not?)

  • Simple controls, deep chaos

  • Survive longer to unlock even wilder upgrades

🎨 Visual Style: Crafted in a 3-color palette inspired by classic Game Boy games, Steven blends nostalgic pixel art with smooth modern gameplay for a perfect mix of old-school charm and new-school mayhem.

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Dutch, Japanese, Korean, Polish, Portuguese - Brazil, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Turkish
